title: Stochasticity in Agentic Evaluations: Quantifying Inconsistency with Intraclass Correlation

official_release.timing_boundary: The pinned commit is dated 2025-12-17, ten days after immutable arXiv v1 was submitted on 2025-12-07. It is an official review-time release, not demonstrated paper-time code. GitHub API queries at acquisition returned no tags or releases.
official_release.acquisition_scope: The complete pinned archive was downloaded and its ZIP member table was inspected. The release contains README/code and result JSONL artifacts. No methodological audit or result recomputation is claimed by this acquisition record.

claim_boundary: This acquisition creates verifiable full-text, source-archive, and pinned official-release evidence only. It is not a deep review or release audit. No claim is made about ICC estimator validity, repeated-run reliability, convergence, universal replication budgets, grader reliability, calibration, causal capability improvement, professional validity, production fitness, safety, or readiness.
